params.prompt: Use the attached reference image for the real founder/speaker. Create a premium 4:5 Thai-first PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Human founder should look realistic and trustworthy, light gray blazer over black shirt, smiling, speaker/teacher energy. Dark Midnight Luxe Editorial style, black/charcoal/graphite, silver-white typography, electric blue accents. Required text hierarchy: LIMITLESS CLUB top; HERMES AGENT title; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; large Thai hero line: คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; quote: Build the team that never sleeps.; three chips: Chief of Staff Agent, Content Agent, Vibe Coding Agent; CTA: สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; footer: By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Clean mobile readability, premium and human, no robot replacement, no garbled Thai, no extra logos, no duplicate text.
